channel.title: Password-Manager on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Password-Manager on Pi Stack

item.title: TeamPass vs SysPass vs Passky: Best Self-Hosted Password Vault 2026
item.description: Managing passwords across a team or organization requires more than a personal password manager. When you need centralized control, shared credential storage, and audit trails, a self-hosted password vault becomes essential. This guide compares three open-source solutions — TeamPass, SysPass, and Passky — to help you choose the right tool for your infrastructure.
